rationale: The citing paper centers on a licensing/indulgence mechanism (prior virtuous acts increasing luxury choice) and explicitly frames itself against/alongside guilt-reduction accounts, while the cited paper is a direct prior on “earning the right to indulge” via effort-based guilt justification shifting preferences toward luxury rewards. This is a strong conceptual and mechanism-level overlap, and the pair has an exact DOI match in the reference list, so it is not safely treated as a mere incidental mention.
